text: Ask Aphrodite who among your court truly loves you
outcome: She laughs — a sound like pearls falling into honey. 'The stable girl. She has loved you since the day you arrived, mud-spattered and half-frozen. She will never say it. But she leaves fresh straw in your chambers every morning. That is her love letter.'

text: Ask Aphrodite who among your court will betray you
outcome: Her smile fades. 'The castellan. He thinks you are weak — a bastard propped up by a distant king. He writes to your half-brother, offering to open the gates when the time comes.' She touches your cheek. 'Do not kill him. Turn him. A turned spy is worth ten dead ones.'

text: Request Aphrodite's blessing to command attention
outcome: She touches your face. A warmth spreads through you — not desire, but presence. 'You were always compelling, bastard. You just did not believe it. Now — go. When you speak, they will listen.' You do. They do.

text: Learn the art of persuasion from Aphrodite herself
outcome: She teaches you not how to seduce, but how to see — to read desire in others, to understand what they truly want. 'Love is a weapon,' she says. 'But understanding love is a shield. Learn both. You will need them.'
